name: Rand Logistics, Inc.
description: Rand Logistics, Inc. is a provider of bulk freight shipping services throughout the Great Lakes region. Through its subsidiaries, the company operates a fleet of self-unloading bulk carriers, including conventional vessels and integrated tug/barge units. The company specializes in the transportation of dry bulk commodities such as construction aggregates, salt, grain, coal, and iron ore for various industrial customers. Headquartered in Williamsville, New York, Rand Logistics serves as a critical link in the supply chain for businesses operating across the United States and Canada, facilitating efficient maritime transport across the Great Lakes system.
